source: Captured by eval-gate --update-baseline (builtin-only registry) on SDK 0.3.207 + settingSources:[] (V8.5 Phase 1b, 2026-07-12). SUPERSEDES the 2026-07-10 incumbent (76.88/toolSelection 57.95), which was measured with the operator's Claude Code config (~/.claude/CLAUDE.md + rules + MEMORY.md, ~23k tokens) leaked into every call via unset settingSources — that score was contamination-flattered and is unreachable by the isolated system. Clean population runs to date: 53.20/53.59/54.46/56.01/51.65 (+-~2.2 run-to-run; epsilon 2.0 is TIGHT until tool_selection grows to >=150 cases).
note: Refresh with `npm run eval:gate -- --run --update-baseline` after a confirmed-good model swap. epsilon is composite points on the 0-100 scale.
